admin.title: Enumerator admin
video.A1.title: Welcome
video.A1.caption.0: Welcome to the farming game! You will play three seasons.
video.A1.caption.1: The first season is just for practice — it does not count.
video.A1.caption.2: The next two seasons are real.
video.A1.caption.3: Tokens you earn are converted to real money that you take home today.
video.A2.title: Weather
video.A2.caption.0: Your harvest depends on the rains.
video.A2.caption.1: Most seasons — four out of five — there will be good rains, and your crops will grow well.
video.A2.caption.2: But sometimes — one out of five — there is bad rain, and your crops fail.
video.A2.caption.3: You cannot predict which season. It is random, like real weather.
video.A3.title: Budget
video.A3.caption.0: Each season, you receive 25 tokens. These are your budget.
video.A3.caption.1: Tokens buy farming inputs. Any you don't spend stay in your lockbox.
video.A3.caption.2: Each new season you get 25 fresh tokens.
video.A4.title: Fertilizer — good rain
video.A4.caption.0: You can buy fertilizer for your farm. Each bag costs 1 token.
video.A4.caption.1: If the rains are good, each bag gives you 2 tokens back — double!
video.A4.caption.2: One bag in, two tokens out.
video.A4.caption.3: If you buy all 10 bags in good rain, you get 20 tokens back.
video.A5.title: Fertilizer — bad rain
video.A5.caption.0: But if the rains are bad, your crops fail.
video.A5.caption.1: No matter how much fertilizer you bought, you get 0 tokens back.
video.A5.caption.3: But tokens in your lockbox are still yours — they are safe.
video.A6.title: How to play
video.A6.caption.1: Your tokens start in the lockbox, on the left.
video.A6.caption.2: Press + to buy fertilizer. Your lockbox updates automatically.
video.A6.caption.3: When finished, press the green plant button.
video.A6.caption.4: Be careful — once you press it, you cannot change your mind.
video.A7A.title: Round 2 — what's new
video.A7A.caption.0: You have one more season to play. This round counts for your payment, just like Round 1.
video.A7A.caption.1: You can still buy fertilizer. But now you can also buy improved seeds — and insurance for those seeds if you want.
video.A7A.caption.2: The improved seeds cost 10 tokens. If the rain is good, they pay 30. If the rain is bad, they pay nothing — the crop fails.
video.A7A.caption.3: Insurance costs 2 tokens more. It helps you recoup the seed cost if the rain is bad.
video.A7B.title: Round 2 — what's new
video.A7B.caption.0: You have one more season to play. This round counts for your payment, just like Round 1.
video.A7B.caption.1: You can still buy fertilizer. But now you can also buy improved seeds.
video.A7B.caption.2: The improved seeds cost 12 tokens. If the rain is good, they pay 30. If the rain is bad, the seeds themselves pay nothing — the crop fails.
video.A7B.caption.3: But the price already includes insurance — so even in bad rain you get something back to cover part of the seed cost.
video.B1.title: Seeds and insurance
video.B1.caption.0: Seeds cost 10 tokens. Insurance costs 2 tokens more — 12 total.
video.B1.caption.1: If there is good rain: seeds earn you 30. Insurance pays nothing.
video.B1.caption.2: If there is bad rain: seeds fail. But insurance pays you back 10.
video.B1.caption.3: Either way, you are not left with nothing.
video.B2.title: The seed bundle
video.B2.caption.0: The improved seeds cost 12 tokens. This price includes insurance — 10 for seeds, 2 for insurance.
video.B2.caption.1: If there is good rain: you earn 30 tokens. The insurance pays nothing.
video.B2.caption.2: If there is bad rain: your crop fails. But the insurance pays you back 10.
video.B2.caption.3: Either way, you get something back.
